positive: Minimalist geometric forest creatures gathering: a gentle, stylized deer, a fluffy rabbit, and a whimsical fox silhouetted against a vibrant watercolor sunset background. The animals are designed in clean, flowing lines, creating a charming, interconnected composition. The style should be a mix of whimsical folk art, modern kawaii aesthetics, and stained-glass linework. Focus on strong, easily printable silhouettes and clear definition. Use a limited, harmonious color palette: deep indigos, emerald greens, burnt orange, and muted golds. The composition must be highly central and perfectly balanced, suitable for a t-shirt print. Studio lighting, vector art quality, high contrast, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, grainy, jpeg artifacts, ugly, horror, realistic, photorealistic, signature
